auth.login_sub: Log in to continue your learning.

home.tag: AI Platform for the Moroccan Bac
home.badge: AI Platform for the Moroccan Bac
home.desc: Personalized study plan, animated visual learning and guided academic orientation — all in one, free, made for you.
home.feat_desc: Each tool is designed for a specific need. Together, they cover your entire journey to the bac.
home.feat1_desc: A study plan built around your actual level, your schedule and your gaps identified by AI.
home.feat2_desc: Every difficult concept transformed into a progressive animated explanation generated in real time by AI.
home.feat3_desc: Psychological and academic analysis to discover the tracks that truly match who you are.
home.step1_desc: Sign up in 30 seconds, no credit card required.
home.step2_desc: Study Plan, Visual Learning or Career Advisor — start with what interests you.
home.step3_desc: Personalized results generated instantly based on your profile.
home.cta_title: Ready to change the way you learn?
home.cta_sub: Join thousands of Moroccan students preparing their bac with AI.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions? Don't hesitate to write to us!
contact.info_sub: Say something to start a live chat!
contact.subject: Select a subject?

smart.title: Choose your
smart.sub: Smart tools to support your learning

study.title: Study Plan Generator
study.subtitle: Your personal study companion
study.totalWarn: Intensive plan — we optimize every minute
study.moreInfo: The more precise, the better the plan
study.bloc3Sub: An honest assessment helps build a realistic plan
study.bloc4Sub: We will take this into account in your plan
study.rienSub: I just need an organized plan
study.motivSubTitle: A few questions to understand you better
study.motivPlaceholder: Answer freely, there is no right or wrong answer…
study.motivEncourage: Your answers will make your plan even more precise
study.score4: Very good level — a few points to consolidate
study.score3: Good level — plan will reinforce what you know
study.score1: Building from scratch — now's the right time
study.score0: Starting from zero — together, step by step
study.profileMsg: This plan accounts for your obstacles and psychology

visual.title: Learn with AI
visual.subtitle: Ask a question — AI generates a step-by-step explanation with an animation per step.
visual.questionPlaceholder: e.g. How to solve a quadratic equation?
visual.loadingSub: Each step generates its own animation — this may take 30-60 seconds
visual.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.
visual.noVideo: Animation not available for this step
visual.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Make sure the backend is running.

career.title: Career Advisor
career.subtitle: Discover your profile, hidden strengths, and the paths that truly suit you.
career.startCard: To begin, tell me a little about yourself
career.descLabel: Describe yourself in a few words (optional)
career.descPlaceholder: e.g.: I'm shy, I like math but often doubt myself...
career.loadingQSub: Our AI analyzes your profile to create a questionnaire that truly fits you.
career.loadingASub: Our AI explores your answers to uncover your hidden strengths.
career.answerHere: Write your answer here, take your time...
career.croyancesTitle: What might be holding you back
career.radarSub: Compatibility level according to your profile.
career.barSub: Purple: your strengths. Orange: what deserves attention.
career.encouragement_3: You are making good progress — there are no wrong answers here.
career.encouragement_7: You are showing real reflection. That is exactly what is needed.
career.encouragement_10: Almost done! These last questions are the most important.

profile.delete_confirm_text: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

pageshell.visual_desc: Transform any difficult concept into an animated explanation step by step.
pageshell.career_desc: Analyze your psychological and academic profile to discover the tracks that suit you.

footer.tagline: Ask questions anytime. Our AI assistant helps you understand lessons and solve exercises step by step.
